title: Date stamp for latest comment

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We currently have a workflow that displays the latest update in a text column with this format [user]:[body].

We need to be able to use the date the update was posted so the format can be: [user][date]:[body].

Right now we have to type in the date manually for all latest comments.

What are you trying to achieve

The latest comments are exported for other teams. We have to fill in the date manually each time.
